name: Piperine
summary: Piperine is the major pungent alkaloid of black pepper and a well-known bioavailability enhancer. Human evidence is strongest for pharmacokinetic interaction effects rather than broad stand-alone therapeutic outcomes.
description: Piperine from black pepper can enhance absorption and exposure of co-administered compounds by affecting intestinal metabolism and transport; effects vary.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
